summary: Completed testing of Blog System feature. All backend APIs (18/18 tests passed, 1 skipped) and frontend UI elements verified. Blog CRUD, settings, scheduler status, and admin panel all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: blog_routes.py: serialize_doc properly excludes MongoDB _id and adds id field
blog_routes.py: Settings validation correctly validates posts_per_week (1-7), preferred_hour (0-23), preferred_days (valid day names)
blog_routes.py: Auto-derive preferred_days when posts_per_week changes

BlogAdminPage.jsx: Uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements (settings-toggle-btn, auto-generate-toggle, posts-per-week-select, day-toggle-{day}, preferred-hour-select, save-settings-btn, generate-btn)
BlogPostPage.jsx: Includes SEO meta tags via react-helmet, Schema.org JSON-LD for Article and FAQPage, breadcrumbs, FAQ section
APScheduler integration with sync_scheduler() properly removes/adds jobs based on auto_generate_enabled

success_rate.backend: 100% (18/18 passed, 1 skipped - no rejected posts to delete)

seed_data_creation: 3 blog posts exist (1 published, 2 pending), created by DeepSeek AI generation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blog system fully functional. DeepSeek API generates posts (30-60 sec), so POST /api/blog/generate endpoint skipped in tests. APScheduler running but auto-generation disabled by default. Settings can toggle auto-generation on/off with configurable days and time.

PUT_SETTINGS.result: Updates settings, auto-derives preferred_days from posts_per_week

SETTINGS_VALIDATION.result: Validates posts_per_week (1-7), preferred_hour (0-23), preferred_days (valid day names)

GET_PENDING_POSTS.result: Returns pending posts with correct structure

GET_POST_BY_SLUG_OR_ID.result: Returns full post with content by slug or post_id

UPDATE_POST_STATUS.result: Changes status to published/rejected/pending, sets published_at for published

DELETE_POST.result: No rejected posts to safely delete

GET_SITEMAP.result: Returns published post slugs with category and published_at

BLOG_ADMIN_PAGE.result: Loads with posts list, filter tabs, generate section, settings button

SETTINGS_PANEL.result: Opens/closes on Settings button click, has auto-generate toggle, posts per week selector, day toggles, hour selector, save button

PUBLIC_BLOG_PAGE.result: Shows published posts with search, category filters, pagination

PUBLIC_BLOG_POST_PAGE.result: Shows full article with SEO meta tags, FAQs (4 items), breadcrumbs, tags, CTA

playwright_test_results.public_blog_page: PASSED - Shows 1 published post, search input, category filters
playwright_test_results.blog_post_page: PASSED - Title, breadcrumbs (Home > Blog > Category), FAQs (4), tags, CTA section
playwright_test_results.blog_admin_login: PASSED - Admin can login and navigate to blog-admin
playwright_test_results.blog_admin_page: PASSED - Shows 3 posts, filter tabs, generate section
playwright_test_results.settings_panel_elements: PASSED - All elements present (auto-toggle, posts/week, days, hour, save)
